calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Dec-22-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name, Gender and Issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Henry Ray Howard Vizinau was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.
The Court requires further documentation from petitioner in order to proceed with the proposed change of gender and issuance of a new birth certificate. The Court will proceed with petitioner's request for change of name.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Teri Ann Vizinau.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Dec-01-2009 Reset To Dec-22-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name, Gender and Issuance of a New Birth Certificate.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Henry Ray Howard Vizinau was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court requires further information from petitioner in order to proceed with today's hearing. Good cause appearing, this matter is continued to December 22, 2009 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218 for further hearing on petitioner request for change of name, gender and issuance of a new birth certificate. No further publication required.
